summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.windows; public class WinFileAssociationUtils { public static String getAssoc(String ext) { Process process = WinCMDUtils.getInstance().processCommand("cmd.exe", "/c", "assoc", ext); return WinCMDUtils.getInstance().getProcessOutput(process); } public static String getFtype(String ftype) { Process process = WinCMDUtils.getInstance().processCommand("cmd.exe", "/c", "ftype", ftype);
